benefits.description: Noticeable mood lift, laughing more, feeling more connected to coworkers
Improved social instincts and connection to people; better conversational engagement in social situations
Noticeable sex drive for the first time; desire to find a partner rather than just masturbate
Tanning effect — became very tan, described as 'absurd'; noted as undesired benefit/side effect

side_effects.description: Excessive skin tanning considered undesirable at intended dose; colors outside appeared less saturated for about 1 hour after dosing melanotan 1

protocol_notes: OP initially tried melanotan 1 and noticed only tanning and a transient desaturation of outdoor colors but no social/cognitive effects. Switched to melanotan II at 100mcg every 3 days. Weighs 130lbs. Reports social and libido effects are noticeable only in social situations, not when alone. Also takes lactobacillus reuteri supplement. Interested in cycling off or microdosing to reduce tanning. Considering PT-141 as an alternative.
